name: ai-compare
title: AI Compare
description: Open AI Compare in the browser with a query from Raycast.
author: AICompare

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search with AI Compare
commands.description: Open the AI Compare browser extension and start searching.

preferences.name: sites
preferences.title: Default Sites
preferences.description: Comma-separated site names passed to the compare page.

preferences.name: siteType
preferences.title: Site Type
preferences.description: AI Compare site category passed as the type URL parameter.

preferences.name: openclawMode
preferences.title: OpenClaw Mode
preferences.description: Include openclaw=1 in the launch URL for automation/test runners.
preferences.label: Enable OpenClaw URL mode
